exercises.title: Concatenation Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate error reduction through code concatenation.
tasks: Implement error rate formula: p_L = c·p² per level
Calculate error rates for k levels of concatenation
Find minimum k to achieve target error
Plot error rate vs concatenation level
hints: Use log scale for error rate plots

exercises.title: Threshold Finder
tasks: Simulate logical error rate at various (p, d) pairs
Find crossing point of p_L curves for different d
Plot p_L vs p for multiple distances
Calculate error bars on threshold estimate
hints: At threshold, p_L independent of d
Below threshold, larger d gives lower p_L

exercises.title: Noise Model Comparator
exercises.description: Compare thresholds under different noise models.
hints: Depolarizing: uniform X, Y, Z errors
Circuit: error at each gate location
Biased can have much higher threshold

exercises.title: Resource Estimator
exercises.description: Estimate resources needed for target computation.
tasks: Input: circuit size L, target error ε, physical rate p
hints: Overhead can be 100-1000× for practical cases
